title: Survey - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Bournemouth East
text_excerpt: Survey - Tom Hayes Labour MP Bournemouth East Skip to content Home Survey News Surgeries About Me Get In Touch What Matters To You? As your MP, I want to make sure Bournemouth East is heard loud and clear in Parliament. Too often, Westminster feels like a bubble, disconnected from the reality of life here. I’m determined to change that. Every time I speak in Parliament or meet with Ministers, I want to champion the issues that matter most to you. Let me know your thoughts by filling in the survey below. First Name * Last Name * Postcode * Email * Mobile Is there one key issue Tom Hayes MP or your councillors can help with? Whoever is in power, if there was one thing you could change, what would it be? Which issue do you think is most important at the moment? Select your top issue The economy The NHS Cost of living Housing and rent Climate change and the environment Crime Tax Pensions Immigration and asylum Education Family life and childcare Brexit Transport Welfare benefits Defence and security COVID Don't Know Would you like to hear back from Tom about the matters you've raised? * Yes, I'd like Tom to reply to what I've shared No, I just want him to be aware of my views Would you like to sign up for updates from Tom Hayes MP in the form of his newsletter? You can opt out at any time. Yes, add me to the list No, don't add me to the list On a scale of 1-10, how likely are you to vote Reform? Select a party Labour Conservatives Liberal Democrats Greens Reform Restore Independent Don't Know Not Labour Won't Say Won't Vote Another Party Share Your Thoughts Please do not fill in this field. The Labour Party may use the information you provide about your views to understand which issues are most relevant to you and to help us campaign better. The Labour Party uses your personal data for a variety of reasons related to engaging in the democratic process. Where we rely on consent you are always able to opt out. We may use the information you provide, such as your name and postcode, to match the data provided to your electoral register record held on our electoral database, which could inform future communications you receive from us. To find out more about how we use your personal data and to view our Profiling Notice, please see Labour.org.uk/privacy-policy.
